item:
Auto switch
(can the engine automatically switch from reading snapshot data to reading incremental data?)

Schema/database inclusion/exclusion
(can the user specify what schema/database to include/exclude from a table to be replicated?)
Flink:
%U%[

Only possible with DataStream API; Table/SQL API can be used for monitoring changes on a single table

](https://ververica.github.io/flink-cdc-connectors/master/content/about.html?highlight=datastream#features) / [Apparently not possible?](https://github.com/ververica/flink-cdc-connectors/issues/1817)

item:
Column inclusion/exclusion
(can the user specify what fields/columns to include/exclude from a table to be replicated?)

Table inclusion/exclusion
(can the user specify what tables to include/exclude in the replication process?)
Flink:
%U%[

Only possible with DataStream API; Table/SQL API can be used for monitoring changes on a single table

](https://ververica.github.io/flink-cdc-connectors/master/content/about.html?highlight=datastream#features) / [Apparently not possible?](https://github.com/ververica/flink-cdc-connectors/issues/1817)

item:
Re-run snapshot
(can the user specify to re-run a snapshot; a.k.a. ad-hoc snapshot; in case of i.e. data corruption?)

DDL forward
(does the connector optionally have a mechanism to forward changes in the database schema?)

Metadata automatic discovery
(can the engine automatically create destination tables without the user manually mapping schemas for each table?)

Automatic synchronization of schema changes
(can the engine automatically )

Initial snapshot in incremental snapshot mode
(can the engine do a initial snapshot using the incremental snapshot algorithm?)

Parallel snapshot reading per table
(can the engine replicate 1 table in parallel by chunks?)

Lock-free reading
(can the engine avoid acquiring a global read lock during snapshotting and thus avoid user lock permissions)

Checkpointing
(can the engine provide the ability to perform checkpoint in chunk level?/is it possible to pause and resume during snapshotting?)
